# Jonathan Aerts — Senior Cloud Platform Architect

> Senior Cloud Platform Architect with 15+ years of IT experience, 5+ years focused on enterprise Azure. Specialized in designing and delivering Azure Landing Zones from scratch — governance, multi-region networking, full IaC automation via Terraform/Terragrunt. Currently delivering a regulated banking-grade Landing Zone at POST Luxembourg (CSSF Cloud Outsourcing, DORA, NIS2, ISO 27001).

## Profile
- Location: Belgium · Luxembourg · open to EU remote
- Current role: Senior Cloud Platform Architect at POST Luxembourg (Aug 2024 — present)
- Target roles: Senior / Principal Cloud Architect, Cloud Solution Architect at hyperscalers (Microsoft, AWS, HashiCorp), scale-ups, or regulated enterprise environments
- Engagement: selectively exploring next IC role — Belgium / Luxembourg / EU remote only, no management roles, no body-shop contracting

## Key pages
- / : recruiter-oriented summary (experience, skills, certifications, contact)
- /blog/ : technical notes — Azure Landing Zone, Terraform/Terragrunt, AKS, regulated cloud
- /rss.xml : Atom/RSS feed for the blog

## Markdown variants for agents
- /index.md : recruiter summary as markdown (agent-readable)
- /blog/index.md : blog index as markdown
- /blog/<slug>.md : individual articles as markdown
- All markdown routes are served with Content-Type: text/markdown; charset=utf-8

## Core expertise
- Azure Landing Zone (Enterprise-Scale, Microsoft CAF, Azure Verified Modules)
- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform, Terragrunt (60+ production-ready modules, open source library)
- GitOps: Argo CD, Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions
- AKS / Kubernetes: private clusters, workload identity, GitOps deployments
- Networking: Hub-Spoke, Virtual WAN, ExpressRoute, Palo Alto VM-Series
- Identity & Governance: Entra ID, Conditional Access, PIM, Azure Policy, RBAC
- Security: Defender for Cloud, Sentinel, Key Vault, Workload Identity (zero persistent secrets)
- Regulated environments: CSSF Circular 22/806, DORA, NIS2, ISO 27001, CIS Benchmarks

## Currently learning
- AWS Landing Zone (Control Tower, SCPs, IaC)

## Certifications
- Obtained: AZ-104, AZ-500, AZ-700, HashiCorp Terraform Associate
- In progress: AZ-305 (Azure Solutions Architect Expert), AWS Solutions Architect Associate

## Open source
- terraform-azurerm-modules : https://github.com/John6810/terraform-azurerm-modules — networking, AKS, Key Vault, RBAC, Private Endpoints, FinOps Hub, Palo Alto HA, aligned with AVM patterns
